name: dogfu
description: Sales toolkit on the dogfu CLI: lead-research (Discover → Qualify → Enrich → CRM) and lead-touch (work leads through the outreach cadence in Close), plus berlin-theme — Berlin's brand style guide for on-brand sales collateral.

interface.shortDescription: Research leads and manage outreach in Close
interface.longDescription: Research and qualify sales prospects against an ICP, enrich decision-makers, write results to Close CRM, and manage follow-up outreach with the dogfu CLI. Includes berlin-theme — Berlin's brand style guide so any sales collateral you design (pages, one-pagers, posters, emails) comes out on-brand.
defaultPrompt: Research and qualify a prospect against our ICP
Show me which leads need a follow-up today
Record the outreach I just sent for a lead
